Verma : hverma@sgsits.ac.in : : View Profile Latest News & Events POSTER EXHIBITION-2025 27-09-2025 One day workshop on Industrial Automation- PLC & SCADA 24-09-2025 Practical Motor Winding Training for Engineers 24-09-2025 Poster Exhibition 2025 18-09-2025 View More Electrical Engineering Welcome to the Department of Electrical Engineering at Shri G.S. Institute of Technology & Science, Indore. The Department of Electrical Engineering is one of the oldest department established in the year 1957. At present, the department offers both undergraduate and postgraduate courses in Electrical Engineering. The Department has well equipped laboratories in the area of Electrical Machines, High Voltage & Power Systems, Control Systems Engineering, Electrical Measurements, Power Electronics & Drives, Microprocessor and Embedded System. Department has software computing facilities with latest software and high speed Internet connection to support modeling and simulation work. The Department is actively engaged in research, consultancy and testing in the area of Electrical Engineering. The Department is a recognized QIP center for Ph.D. and M.E. Programs. Department offers postgraduate courses in Electrical Engineering with specialization in “Power Electronics” and “Power System and Control”. The department is regularly publishing research papers/articles in international/national journals/conferences. The competent candidates seek admission in the department. Students of the department are offered remarkable placements through on/off campus selection. Many students are getting opportunities in the PSUs, national/international institute and laboratories for research and higher studies. Alumni of the department are serving at top level positions in all major sectors of the state/central government and private organizations across the globe including NAVRATNA companies. UG Program of the department is accreditated from 2015 by National Board of Accreditation and member of Washington Accord under the category of Tier-I institute. UG Electrical Engg. ACCREDITED Academic Year 2015-16, 2016-17 and 2017-18, i.e., upto 30-06-2018; Further Accredited for 2018-19, 2019-20, 2020-21 and 2021-22, i.e., upto 30/06/2022. Electrical Engineering Welcome to the Department of Electrical Engineering at Shri G.S. Institute of Technology & Science, Indore. The Department of Electrical Engineering is one of the oldest department established in the year 1957. At present, the department offers both undergraduate and postgraduate courses in Electrical Engineering. The Department has well equipped laboratories in the area of Electrical Machines, High Voltage & Power Systems, Control Systems Engineering, Electrical Measurements, Power Electronics & Drives, Microprocessor and Embedded System. Department has software computing facilities with latest software and high speed Internet connection to support modeling and simulation work. The Department is actively engaged in research, consultancy and testing in the area of Electrical Engineering. The Department is a recognized QIP center for Ph.D. and M.E. Programs. Department offers postgraduate courses in Electrical Engineering with specialization in “Power Electronics”
